geo.headline: Shop Salvya in your region?
geo.pricingMorocco: Morocco pricing in MAD. Change country to view international rates.
geo.pricingInternational: International catalog pricing. Select Morocco for local MAD prices.
geo.currencyHint: Updates the currency symbol only. Product prices follow your selected country unless Morocco is chosen.
geo.detectedUnknown: Location unavailable — choose your country below.
geo.chargeNote: Checkout is processed in EUR. Displayed prices reflect your selected region.
geo.moroccoStorefrontHint: Morocco store · Prices in Moroccan dirham (MAD) · Delivery available in Morocco
geo.mismatchToast: Your connection suggests {detected}. Prices remain set for {selected}.

menu.guestSubtitle: Sign in for orders, likes, and a faster checkout.
menu.guestDiscoverSubtitle: Discover limited drops, follow creators, and shop premium merch — all in one place.
menu.helpPoliciesSubtitle: Tap a section to expand shipping, returns, terms, and support.
menu.shoppingCardSubtitle: Drops, bag, sizing, and order tracking.
menu.aboutBody: Fashion-tech for creators — limited drops, premium merch, and a community that moves culture forward.

bag.title: Your bag
bag.introGuest: Items you add from product pages. Sign in to save your bag to your Salvya account and use it on any device.
bag.introSignedIn: Items you added from product pages — saved on this device. Sign in with cloud sync enabled to keep your bag across devices.
bag.introSynced: Items you added from product pages — saved to your Salvya account and this device. Open checkout when you are ready; nothing is reserved until you complete your order.
bag.emptyHint: On any piece, pick size and color, tap {addVariant}, then add another size or color before checkout.
bag.footerStatus: {badge} · {variants, plural, one {# variant} other {# variants}} · {pieces, plural, one {# piece} other {# pieces}}
bag.multiCheckoutNote: One checkout walks through each variant in order.
bag.checkoutCta: Checkout · {count, plural, one {# variant} other {# variants}}
bag.checkoutSecureNote: Secure Salvya checkout for everything in your bag.

trackOrder.title: Track your shipment
trackOrder.description: Look up your Salvya order with your order number and the email used at checkout.
trackOrder.notFound: We could not find an order with those details. Check the number and email, then try again.
trackOrder.signInPrompt: Signed in? View all orders in your account.

auth.signInDescription: Log in to your Salvya account to manage orders and saved details.
auth.createAccountDescription: Create a Salvya account to save your details, track orders, and shop artist merch faster.
auth.signInCardSubtitle: Sign in with Google or your email. Your bag and likes sync when you return.
auth.createAccountCardSubtitle: Fastest with Google, or create a password. One profile for checkout and your bag.
auth.rememberMeHint: Stay signed in on this device until you sign out.
auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth.clientStartFailed: Could not start sign-in. Refresh and try again.

checkout.paypalVerifyNote: We confirm amount and capture with PayPal before your order is marked paid. This usually takes a few seconds.
checkout.codNote: Cash on delivery — pay the courier when your parcel arrives.
checkout.paidNote: Payment verified with PayPal. We will email you when your order ships.

account.noOrders: No orders on this account yet.
account.noOrdersGuest: Sign in to see orders linked to your account.
account.notificationsEmptyBody: Bag updates, likes, follows, and orders will appear here automatically.

shop.title: Shop official artist merch
shop.description: Browse limited-run hoodies, tees, and drops from artists on Salvya.

artist.officialShop: Official Salvya shop for this artist — same secure checkout as the rest of the store.

seo.defaultDescription: Official artist merch on Salvya: limited runs, premium streetwear, European shipping, and a mobile-first checkout built for fans.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Check your connection and try again.
